release: Hand Sync & GPU Performance Fix Release
scope: Phase 1: clean code, local icon assets and centralized translations
Phase 2: premium visual system and Dark/Light polish
Phase 3: hand tracking reliability, pinch stability, writing smoothness and camera isolation
Phase 4: export, save, update and onboarding reliability
Phase 5: final release metadata, documentation, Termux replacement and deploy checklist
v5.2.0: exact rendered-video landmark projection, GPU-first local inference and Android-safe hand-tracking performance recovery.
privacy: Drawing data stays local unless the creator explicitly requests an export, share or AI generation.
releaseGate: npm run build first synchronizes the official Google HandLandmarker task, validates the pinned SHA-256, runs the hand sync/GPU performance contract, then copies the local runtime to public/. The runtime never downloads a model.
